positive: A majestic, stylized celestial sloth hanging from an oversized moon flower. The sloth has a serene, dreamy expression and is adorned with bioluminescent vines and small, glowing fireflies. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, set against a deep indigo and nebula purple background. Use flat graphic design principles combined with elegant, ethereal watercolor textures. The style should be whimsical, highly detailed, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast between the luminous subject and the dark background. Ultra-high resolution, vector illustration quality, central focus, clean silhouette, symmetrical arrangement.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, artifact, grainy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, realistic photo, solid colors, cluttered background
